query: /simplify apply src/security/permissions.ts by inlining the requireAdmin helper into its only caller
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes that a single-use abstraction can still encode a security or policy boundary.
Agent does not inline or remove the helper until it proves the boundary is purely pass-through and non-policy.
Agent asks before editing or falls back to Analyze with the policy-boundary risk called out.
Agent preserves authorization, validation, and security semantics.
